ikigai.headline: The Japanese art of Ikigai
ikigai.sub: Ikigai (生き甲斐) is a Japanese concept that means 'a reason for being'. It's the intersection of your passions, values, and skills.

framework.headline: The Ikigai Framework
framework.sub: Every program we run is dedicated to these four pillars — the building blocks of a purposeful life.

love.title: What You LOVE
love.desc: Discover what fills you with energy and what you find deeply fulfilling.

goodAt.title: What You're GOOD AT
goodAt.desc: Identify your natural gifts and skills developed through experience.

need.title: What the World NEEDS
need.desc: Find opportunities where your talents can solve meaningful problems.

paidFor.title: What You Can Be Paid For
paidFor.desc: Build sustainable income streams from your purpose-driven work.

values.headline: A world where everyone lives with purpose
values.sub: We believe every person deserves to live with confidence, clarity and meaning.

confidence.title: Confidence
confidence.desc: Helping individuals step into their power and own their story.

clarity.title: Clarity
clarity.desc: Cutting through confusion to find what truly matters to you.

meaning.title: Meaning
meaning.desc: Creating lives filled with purpose, connection and fulfillment.

items.quote: Ikigai changed how I see myself. The personality development sessions helped me discover strengths I never knew I had. I walked into my first job interview with complete confidence.
items.name: Riya Sharma

items.quote: The public speaking program transformed me from someone terrified of audiences to a confident presenter. I now lead client meetings and company town halls.
items.name: Arjun Mehta

items.quote: Career counselling at Ikigai gave me the clarity I needed to pivot from a job I hated to a career I love. The mentors genuinely care about your growth.
items.name: Priya Patel

app.headline: Your ikigaiE Journey, In Your Pocket
app.sub: Take your learning wherever life takes you. Access courses, track progress, and connect with mentors from the ikigaiE app.

cta.headline: Ready to find your
cta.sub: Whether you're a student discovering your path or a professional reshaping your career, we have a program designed for you.

about.headline: Empowering India, One Purpose at a Time
about.sub: IkigaiE is India's premier personal development institute dedicated to helping individuals discover their life purpose and build the skills to pursue it.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.desc: To make purpose-driven education accessible to every Indian, regardless of background or circumstance.

vision.title: Our Vision
vision.desc: A world where every person wakes up excited for their day — living with clarity, confidence, and contribution.

story.headline: Born from a Question
story.sub: Founded in 2019, IkigaiE was born from a simple but powerful question: Why do so many talented Indians feel lost and unfulfilled in their careers?
story.p1: Our founders — educators, psychologists, and career coaches — came together with a shared belief: that the education system was failing people by focusing on degrees instead of direction, information instead of wisdom.
story.p2: Drawing from the Japanese concept of Ikigai and modern positive psychology, we built a framework that helps people find the intersection of their passions, strengths, and the world's needs.
story.p3: Today, we've helped over 500 students and professionals across India transform their lives — and we're just getting started.

philosophy.headline: The Philosophy Behind IkigaiE
philosophy.sub: We believe education should transform lives, not just transfer information.

items.title: Purpose Over Degree
items.desc: A degree opens a door. Purpose determines where you go once you're inside. We help you find what you're truly here to do.

items.title: Wisdom Over Information
items.desc: The internet has all the information. We curate and apply it — turning knowledge into wisdom through experience and reflection.

items.title: Community Over Competition
items.desc: India's most powerful resource is its people. We build communities of learners who lift each other up, not tear each other down.

items.title: Action Over Theory
items.desc: Every session has a takeaway you can apply immediately. We design for transformation, not just understanding.

ikigai_deep.headline: Why Ikigai?
ikigai_deep.p1: The Japanese island of Okinawa has one of the highest concentrations of centenarians in the world. Researchers studying this phenomenon found a common thread: ikigai — a reason for being, a purpose that gets you out of bed each morning.
ikigai_deep.p2: We adopted this concept because it addresses the root cause of unhappiness in careers and life: misalignment. When what you do doesn't connect with who you are, you feel empty. Ikigai fixes that.
ikigai_deep.p3: Our framework is not just philosophy — it's a practical system. We use psychometric assessments, one-on-one coaching, group workshops, and skills training to help you find and live your ikigai.

items.title: Discover
items.desc: Self-assessment, reflection exercises, and psychometric tools to map your strengths, values, and passions.

items.title: Design
items.desc: Work with mentors to design a personalised learning path aligned with your ikigai.

items.title: Develop
items.desc: Gain the skills, knowledge, and mindset shifts needed to bring your purpose to life.

items.title: Deploy
